_meta.purpose: Launcher validation probe — verifies the orchestration pipeline end-to-end with minimal cost.

model_strategy.quality: Single worker with low reasoning — sufficient for smoke test probe
model_strategy.optimization: Compact directive avoids reading full AGENTS.md. Tight max_response_lines (3) prevents verbose output.
model_strategy.token_saving: Lowest possible cost: low reasoning, compact prompt, minimal response. This is a pipeline test, not production work.

improvements: success_criteria separates pass/fail from validation detail

agents.name: probe-writer
agents.mission: Verify the orchestration pipeline by creating one bounded file. This is a smoke test, not production work.
agents.task: Create or replace launcher-probe.txt in the working directory containing exactly the text OK.
success_criteria: launcher-probe.txt exists with content exactly OK
validation: Read launcher-probe.txt and confirm content is exactly OK with no trailing whitespace or extra lines.
return_contract: One line: PASS or FAIL with the file path.
stop_when: File created and validated. Do not read other files or explore the workspace.
